text: Professor Fowler is great ! He spends some time explaining the theory behind the topic , and makes everything pretty easy to visualize . I would love if there were a few more resources with example problems . The quizzes can be pretty challenging , if you haven ' t done any practice problems first . My favorite thing about this MOOC and Prof . Fowler is his excitement - - which makes it feel , less like a lecture and more , like a fun conversation about calculus .
